daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are hitting different today, Virgo. You're radiating clarity and quiet confidence. Trust the little intuitive nudges you've been ignoring—they're actually onto something real.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled or single, authenticity is your superpower rn. Someone notices when you drop the overthinking and just *be*. Real connection happens in those unguarded moments.
daily.career: Your attention to detail is about to pay off in unexpected ways. Don't sleep on that random idea bouncing around your head—it's got legs. Your energy is magnetic for collaboration today.
daily.health: Your nervous system is asking for gentleness, not another productivity hack. A slow walk, some water, or literally just sitting still counts as self-care. You don't need to earn rest.

weekly.overview: Mercury's vibing with your sector of growth this week, Virgo. Things are clicking into place in ways that feel less like luck and more like your meticulous planning finally paying off. Trust the process you've been building.
weekly.love: Your people are noticing your energy shift. Whether you're single or coupled up, authenticity is your biggest move right now. Stop overthinking what you should say and just speak your truth.
weekly.career: This is the week to pitch that idea you've been workshopping. Your timing is sharp and your communication lands differently. Someone influential is paying attention—make it count.
weekly.health: Your nervous system's been working overtime. Prioritize sleep this week, even if it means saying no to stuff. Your body's asking for rest, not productivity hacks.
